dashboard.label: Helpdesk Operations
dashboard.description: CorpTech IT Helpdesk — Active Directory security events, authentication activity, and administrative changes. Refresh: real-time.

search.query: index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4740 | stats count AS lockouts
index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625 | stats count AS failures
index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4724 | stats count AS resets
index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4720 | stats count AS new_accounts
index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=5136 OR EventCode=5137 OR EventCode=5141 OR EventCode=4719) | stats count AS changes

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=4625 OR EventCode=4740 OR EventCode=4720 OR EventCode=4724 OR EventCode=4728 OR EventCode=5136 OR EventCode=4719 OR EventCode=4767) | eval event_category = case( EventCode=="4625", "Failed Logon", EventCode=="4740", "Account Lockout", EventCode=="4720", "User Created", EventCode=="4724", "Password Reset", EventCode=="4728", "Group Membership Change", EventCode=="5136" OR EventCode=="5137", "GPO/AD Changed", EventCode=="4719", "Audit Policy Changed", EventCode=="4767", "Account Unlocked", true(), "Other" ) | timechart span=1h count BY event_category

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4740 earliest=-7d | eval locked_account=mvindex(Account_Name,0) | stats count AS lockout_count BY locked_account | sort -lockout_count | head 8

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625 | eval source_ip=coalesce(IpAddress,Source_Network_Address,"unknown") | where source_ip!="unknown" AND source_ip!="-" AND source_ip!="127.0.0.1" AND source_ip!="::1" | stats count AS failures BY source_ip | sort -failures | head 10

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625 | eval target_account=mvindex(Account_Name,1) | eval source_ip=coalesce(IpAddress,Source_Network_Address,"unknown") | bucket _time span=10m | stats count AS failures, values(source_ip) AS source_ips BY _time, target_account | where failures >= 5 | eval risk=case(failures>=20,"CRITICAL",failures>=10,"HIGH",true(),"MEDIUM") | eval window=strftime(_time,"%m/%d %H:%M") | sort -failures | head 20 | table window, risk, target_account, failures, source_ips | rename window AS "Window", risk AS "Risk", target_account AS "Account", failures AS "Failures", source_ips AS "Source IP(s)"

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4740 | eval locked_account=mvindex(Account_Name,0) | eval source_workstation=mvindex(Caller_Computer_Name,0) | eval lockout_time=strftime(_time,"%m/%d %H:%M:%S") | table lockout_time, locked_account, source_workstation, host | sort -lockout_time | head 15 | rename lockout_time AS "Time", locked_account AS "Account", source_workstation AS "From Workstation", host AS "DC"

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=5136 OR EventCode=5137 OR EventCode=5141 OR EventCode=4719) | eval change_type=case( EventCode=="5136","Modified", EventCode=="5137","Created", EventCode=="5141","Deleted", EventCode=="4719","Audit Policy", true(),"Unknown") | eval actor=mvindex(Subject_Account_Name,0) | eval ev_time=strftime(_time,"%m/%d %H:%M") | eval obj=coalesce(mvindex(Object_DN,0),Policy_Change,"N/A") | table ev_time, change_type, actor, obj, host | sort -ev_time | head 15 | rename ev_time AS "Time", change_type AS "Change", actor AS "By", obj AS "Object / Policy", host AS "DC"

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4720 earliest=-30d | eval new_account=mvindex(Target_Account_Name,0) | eval created_by=mvindex(Subject_Account_Name,0) | eval priv_flag=if(match(new_account,"(?i)(admin|svc|service|sa_|adm_)"),"⚠ YES","No") | eval create_time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | table create_time, new_account, created_by, priv_flag, host | sort -create_time | rename create_time AS "Created At", new_account AS "New Account", created_by AS "Created By", priv_flag AS "Priv Name?", host AS "DC"

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=4728 OR EventCode=4732 OR EventCode=4756) earliest=-7d | eval member=mvindex(Member_Account_Name,0) | eval grp=mvindex(Target_Account_Name,0) | eval actor=mvindex(Subject_Account_Name,0) | eval is_high_priv=if( match(grp,"(?i)(Domain Admin|Enterprise Admin|Schema Admin|Backup Operator|Administrator)"), "HIGH ⚠","Standard") | eval ev_time=strftime(_time,"%m/%d %H:%M") | table ev_time, member, grp, is_high_priv, actor, host | sort -ev_time | rename ev_time AS "Time", member AS "Member Added", grp AS "Group", is_high_priv AS "Risk", actor AS "Performed By", host AS "DC"

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4767 | eval unlocked_account=mvindex(Target_Account_Name,0) | eval unlocked_by=mvindex(Subject_Account_Name,0) | timechart span=4h count BY unlocked_by

index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624 | eval logon_type_name=case( Logon_Type=="2","Interactive", Logon_Type=="3","Network", Logon_Type=="4","Batch", Logon_Type=="5","Service", Logon_Type=="7","Unlock", Logon_Type=="10","RemoteInteractive (RDP)", Logon_Type=="11","CachedInteractive", true(),"Other (Type ".Logon_Type.")") | stats count BY logon_type_name | sort -count
